notes: Crew-curated must-try food, souvenirs, and experiences across top 30 Emirates DXB destinations. Sources cited per entry. Prices approximate in USD.

must_try_food.item: Full English Breakfast
must_try_food.where: Any greasy spoon cafe (e.g., E Pellici, Bethnal Green)
must_try_food.why: Cultural institution; bacon, eggs, beans, black pudding; cheap and filling before a long return flight

must_try_food.item: Fish and Chips
must_try_food.where: Poppies Fish & Chips, Camden or Spitalfields
must_try_food.why: Classic British; crew bring the smell on board jokes aside — genuinely excellent battered cod

must_try_food.item: Borough Market cheese toastie or jamón
must_try_food.where: Borough Market, London Bridge
must_try_food.why: Best artisan produce in London; grab and walk; crew Saturday morning tradition

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any Waitrose or Sainsbury's supermarket
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Iconic British spread; cheap; excellent gift that divides opinion globally; easy to pack

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Fortnum & Mason, 181 Piccadilly
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Royal Warrant gifting; crew take these back to bases worldwide; beautiful tins reused forever

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Penhaligon's stores, Covent Garden or Burlington Arcade
must_buy_souvenirs.why: British heritage fragrance; eccentric British character bottles; crew gift that impresses

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Liberty London fabric or cosmetics pouch
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Liberty London, Great Marlborough St
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Iconic Liberty print; cosmetics bags popular with crew; distinctive gift

must_buy_souvenirs.where: The Whisky Exchange, Covent Garden
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Compact; variety of expressions; perfect crew gift for spirit-loving colleagues

must_do_experience.item: Walk from Tate Modern to Borough Market along the Thames
must_do_experience.why: Free; world-class art + London's best food market; river views; 3-4 hour ideal layover itinerary

must_do_experience.item: Afternoon tea at Claridge's or The Savoy
must_do_experience.why: Quintessential British experience; finger sandwiches and scones; senior crew tradition

must_do_experience.item: West End show (TKTS discount booth)
must_do_experience.why: World's best theatre; TKTS booth at Leicester Square sells same-day discounts; crew love musicals

must_try_food.item: Pad kra pao (basil stir-fry) at a street stall
must_try_food.where: Any side-street vendor near Sukhumvit area
must_try_food.why: Thailand's true national dish; cheap; 24hr available; crew comeback food after every layover

must_try_food.item: Mango sticky rice
must_try_food.where: Mae Varee, Thonglor Soi 2 (famous stall)
must_try_food.why: Seasonal June-Sep best; iconic Thai dessert; crew bring this to hotels in takeaway bags

must_try_food.item: Tom yum goong from a proper restaurant
must_try_food.where: Baan Phadthai or Err Urban Rustic Thai
must_try_food.why: The real version — nothing like the packet; crew food education for what Thai actually tastes like

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Jim Thompson House store, Siam
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Legendary brand; crew wearable souvenir; quality assurance vs market counterfeits

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Harnn Heritage Spa stores, major malls
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Thai botanical brand; crew carry-on legal; gift for colleagues; coconut body butter beloved by cabin crew

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Boots Thailand (pharmacy chain) or Chatuchak Market
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Genuine Thai herbs; crew use for self-massage; light to pack

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Chatuchak Weekend Market (Sat-Sun)
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Handmade; unique; affordable; crew browse for hours; Section 2-3 best for ceramics

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Or Tor Kor Market or airport duty-free
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Compact gift; Thai green tea and coffee sachets; crew bring home by the bag

must_do_experience.item: Traditional Thai massage (2 hours)
must_do_experience.where: Wat Pho temple massage school or any reputable parlour
must_do_experience.why: Crew jet-lag reset ritual; the real thing for $15-25; crew comparison notes across cities

must_do_experience.item: Floating market day trip (Damnoen Saduak or Amphawa)
must_do_experience.where: Day trip from Bangkok, Sat-Sun best
must_do_experience.why: Iconic Thailand experience; crew with longer layovers take this; Amphawa is more authentic

must_do_experience.item: Rooftop bar sunset (Vertigo, Lebua, or Octave)
must_do_experience.where: Various rooftop bars
must_do_experience.why: Bangkok skyline at sunset is spectacular; crew group ritual before evening flights

must_try_food.item: Chilli crab
must_try_food.where: Jumbo Seafood (Clarke Quay) or No Signboard Seafood
must_try_food.why: Singapore's national dish; messy and communal; crew group dinner essential

must_try_food.item: Chicken rice at Tian Tian, Maxwell Food Centre
must_try_food.where: Maxwell Food Centre, Tanjong Pagar
must_try_food.why: Hawker Centre Michelin; $5 plate; Gordon Ramsay lost to them; crew pilgrimage

must_try_food.item: Kaya toast with soft-boiled eggs and coffee
must_try_food.where: Ya Kun Kaya Toast, any outlet from 7:30am
must_try_food.why: Singapore breakfast ritual; crew morning fuel; the half-soft eggs with dark soy is specific and wonderful

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Bengawan Solo kueh and pineapple tarts
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Bengawan Solo, multiple locations
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Singapore's most gifted kueh brand; pineapple tarts especially; crew buy boxes to take home

must_buy_souvenirs.where: TWG Tea boutiques in malls or airport
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Singapore's luxury tea brand; beautiful tins; crew premium gift that travels well

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Bak kwa (pork jerky) from Bee Cheng Hiang
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Bee Cheng Hiang, multiple outlets
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Singapore pork jerky; crew bring back by the kilo; note: can't bring into some countries (check)

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any pharmacy or supermarket
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Iconic Singapore-origin product; crew have it in every bag; utility gift that everyone keeps

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Katong/Joo Chiat shops or Peranakan Museum store
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Unique to Singapore/Malacca; nonya culture; beautiful small pieces crew take home

must_do_experience.item: Hawker Centre meal at Lau Pa Sat or Old Airport Road
must_do_experience.where: Various hawker centres
must_do_experience.why: The authentic Singapore food court experience; crew eat with locals; open-air; late night

must_do_experience.item: Gardens by the Bay Supertree Grove at dusk
must_do_experience.where: Gardens by the Bay, free outdoor area
must_do_experience.why: The iconic Singapore skyline view; light show at 7:45pm and 8:45pm; crew photo essential

must_do_experience.item: Singapore Sling at Raffles Long Bar
must_do_experience.where: Raffles Hotel Singapore, Beach Rd
must_do_experience.why: Invented here 1915; tourist-priced but authentic; crew rite of passage on their first SIN layover

must_try_food.item: Convenience store onigiri breakfast
must_try_food.where: Lawson, 7-Eleven, or FamilyMart — any branch
must_try_food.why: Rice triangles at $1; transcendent quality; crew morning ritual every Tokyo layover without exception

must_try_food.item: Tonkatsu set at Tonki Meguro
must_try_food.where: 2-1-39 Shimomeguro, Meguro, Tokyo
must_try_food.why: 85-year institution; crispy pork cutlet; single-minded perfection; crew go every layover for 20 years

must_try_food.item: Tsukiji sushi at 6am
must_try_food.where: Tsukiji Outer Market — Sushi Dai or Daiwa Sushi
must_try_food.why: Best sushi at lowest prices when fish is freshest; early morning crew ritual; queues worth it

must_buy_souvenirs.item: KitKat Japan exclusive flavors (matcha, sake, yuzu)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Don Quijote stores, airport duty-free, convenience stores
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Iconic; cheap; perfect gift; flavors unavailable globally; crew carry boxes of these

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Don Quijote, airport duty-free, Isetan B1
must_buy_souvenirs.why: World-class whisky; compact gifting; mini bottles legal in carry-on if sealed; crew favourite souvenir

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any Muji store — Yurakucho or Shinjuku
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Japanese minimalism; crew packing organizers, travel items; practical gift beloved globally

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Noren (Japanese doorway curtain) from Kyoto craft store
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Flying Tiger at Shibuya or Nishiki Market Kyoto day trip
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Traditional Japanese textile; crew home decoration; lightweight to pack

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Tokyu Hands or department store B2 floor
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Reusable Japanese wrapping fabric; eco-gift; multiple uses; crew sustainable souvenir

must_do_experience.item: Onsen (public hot spring bath)
must_do_experience.where: SPA LaQua (Tokyo Dome) or Oedo Onsen Odaiba
must_do_experience.why: Cultural immersion; jet-lag cure; tatami rest areas; crew decompression essential in Japan

must_do_experience.item: Conveyor belt sushi (kaiten-zushi) at Sushiro or Hamazushi
must_do_experience.where: Multiple locations — Sushiro Shibuya or Ikebukuro
must_do_experience.why: Affordable; fun; iPad ordering; crew bring first-timers here; excellent value Japanese food theater

must_do_experience.item: Shibuya Crossing and scramble at rush hour
must_do_experience.where: Shibuya Station exit — Hachiko side
must_do_experience.why: World's busiest pedestrian crossing; free; crew bring everyone they travel with; 5pm-7pm best

must_try_food.item: Bibimbap at Gogung (Insadong)
must_try_food.where: 30-1 Insadong-gil, Jongno-gu, Seoul
must_try_food.why: Stone pot version with dolsot; crew Korean food standard; filling and photogenic

must_try_food.item: Korean fried chicken + beer (chimaek)
must_try_food.where: Any BBQ Chicken or Kyochon outlet
must_try_food.why: Crew after-work ritual in Seoul; crispy double-fried; delivery culture; open till midnight

must_try_food.item: Tteokbokki (spicy rice cakes) at Gwangjang Market
must_try_food.where: Gwangjang Market, Jongno-gu
must_try_food.why: Street food essential; cheap; fire-hot; crew bond over the chilli burn

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Olive Young stores — multiple CBD locations
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Korean beauty is the world standard; crew most consistent purchase in Seoul; Olive Young is the go-to chain

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Gwangjang Market or any supermarket
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Korea's umami secret; crew cooking essential; glass jar packs well; converts everyone who tries it

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Insadong craft shops
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Traditional Korean folk art; wall decoration; crew cultural souvenir; hand-carved in Andong

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Duty-free at ICN or Lotte Mart
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Korean national drink; takju rice wine is underrated; crew pair these for home Korean BBQ nights

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Olive Young or airport duty-free
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Lightest possible crew gift; high quality; single-use; works; crew hand these out on flights too

must_do_experience.item: Jjimjilbang (Korean sauna/bathhouse) all-nighter
must_do_experience.where: Dragon Hill Spa (Yongsan) — open 24hrs
must_do_experience.why: Full Korean body scrub + sauna circuit + sleeping room; crew jet-lag nuclear option; $15 all night

must_do_experience.item: Korean BBQ dinner (KBBQ)
must_do_experience.where: Mapo Galmaegi or Maple Tree House, Itaewon
must_do_experience.why: The real KBBQ experience; grill your own pork belly; crew group ritual every Seoul layover

must_do_experience.item: Bukchon Hanok Village morning walk
must_do_experience.where: Bukchon-ro, Jongno-gu
must_do_experience.why: Free; traditional Korean tile-roofed houses; best before 9am to avoid crowds; crew photo essential

must_try_food.item: Dim sum at Yum Cha Tea House
must_try_food.where: City Hall Maxim's Palace or Tim Ho Wan, Sham Shui Po
must_try_food.why: The original; trolley service at Maxim's; Michelin at Tim Ho Wan; crew Sunday morning ritual

must_try_food.item: Wonton noodle soup at Mak's
must_try_food.where: Mak's Noodle, 77 Wellington St, Central
must_try_food.why: Tiny shrimp wontons; pork lard noodles; small bowl by design; crew arrive at 11am for opening

must_try_food.item: Egg tart (dan tat)
must_try_food.where: Tai Cheong Bakery, Lyndhurst Terrace, Central
must_try_food.why: Chris Patten's favourite; silky custard; opens 7:30am; crew HK breakfast essential

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Pineapple bun (polo bao) bakery goods from Saint Honore
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Saint Honore Cake Shop, multiple locations
must_buy_souvenirs.why: HK-style bread; crew take boxes; polo bun, cocktail bun, and wife cake all crew favourites

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Temple Street Night Market jade accessories
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Temple Street Night Market, Yau Ma Tei (opens 4pm)
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Authentic jade market; small pendants and bracelets for $5-20; crew negotiate in Cantonese

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any Chinese pharmacy or Watson's
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Hong Kong digestive remedy; tiny bottles; crew swear by them for stomach upset mid-flight

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Frozen HK-style pineapple buns from supermarket
must_buy_souvenirs.where: ParknShop or Wellcome supermarkets
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Take home frozen; reheat; better than any bakery abroad; crew fill their bags with these

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Dickson card jewellery or gold accessories
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Nathan Road gold shops, Tsim Sha Tsui
must_buy_souvenirs.why: HK gold jewellery is some of the world's best value; crew purchases here are legendary

must_do_experience.item: Star Ferry Kowloon to Central at night
must_do_experience.where: Tsim Sha Tsui Star Ferry Pier
must_do_experience.why: 10-minute crossing; HK skyline; $0.50; world's best cheap experience; crew never tire of it

must_do_experience.item: Morning tai chi in Victoria Park
must_do_experience.where: Victoria Park, Causeway Bay (6-8am)
must_do_experience.why: Free; watch locals practice; crew who get up early swear this resets their circadian rhythm

must_do_experience.item: Peak Tram + Victoria Peak at sunset
must_do_experience.where: Central Peak Tram Lower Terminus
must_do_experience.why: HK panorama at golden hour; crew bring first-timers; book tram online to skip 45-min queues

must_try_food.item: Croissant from a boulangerise (not a chain)
must_try_food.where: Any neighbourhood boulangerie — Du Pain et des Idées (10th) is exceptional
must_try_food.why: Judge a Parisian bakery by its croissant; crew become connoisseurs after 5 layovers

must_try_food.item: Steak frites at a classic bistro
must_try_food.where: Le Relais de l'Entrecote (no reservations, queue early)
must_try_food.why: One dish done perfectly; secret walnut butter sauce; crew institution; opens 7:30pm

must_try_food.item: Wine and cheese plate at a wine bar (cave à vin)
must_try_food.where: Le Baron Rouge, Aligre Market area
must_try_food.why: Eat standing from barrels; local wine for $4; crew Paris classic that feels lived-in and real

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Diptyque or Maison Margiela REPLICA candle/perfume
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Diptyque Saint-Germain or department stores (Bon Marché)
must_buy_souvenirs.why: French niche fragrance; crew most consistent Paris luxury purchase; Baies candle is crew cult item

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Le Labo Paris stores, Marais
must_buy_souvenirs.why: City-exclusive blends — Poivre 23 was Paris-only; crew hunt these out for themselves and gifts

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Chocolate from Patrick Roger or Pierre Hermé
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Patrick Roger, 108 Bd Saint-Germain / Pierre Hermé boutiques
must_buy_souvenirs.why: World-class French chocolatiers; not cheap but crew gift these for senior colleagues

must_buy_souvenirs.item: French pharmacy staples (Caudalie, La Roche-Posay, Avène)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any pharmacy (Pharmavie, Pharmacie Monge)
must_buy_souvenirs.why: French pharmacy beauty is world-renowned; crew fill bags with Caudalie Vinosource and Avène thermal spray

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Monoprix or specialist fromageries
must_buy_souvenirs.why: France's best butter; crew carry this in cool bags; it converts people to butter forever

must_do_experience.item: Picnic by the Seine with wine and baguette
must_do_experience.where: Pont des Arts or Champ de Mars lawn
must_do_experience.why: Free and quintessentially Parisian; crew buy bread + wine at Monoprix and sit by the river

must_do_experience.item: Marché d'Aligre Saturday morning
must_do_experience.where: Place d'Aligre, 12th arrondissement
must_do_experience.why: Most authentic Paris market; cheap wine and produce; crew shop here for apartment cooking on layovers

must_do_experience.item: Perfume blending workshop at Fragonard or Galimard
must_do_experience.where: Fragonard Parfumeur, 196 Bd Saint-Germain
must_do_experience.why: 2-hour experience creating your own scent; crew senior officers often do this on longer Paris stays

must_try_food.item: Flat white at a Surry Hills cafe
must_try_food.where: Single O or Reuben Hills, Surry Hills
must_try_food.why: The Australian flat white is what inspired global third-wave coffee; crew take pride in this

must_try_food.item: Sydney rock oysters
must_try_food.where: Fish Market (Pyrmont) or Golden Century, Sussex St
must_try_food.why: World's sweetest oysters; eaten alive with lemon; crew shuck these at Sydney Fish Market for $1 each

must_try_food.item: Souvlaki from a Greek precinct
must_try_food.where: Marrickville or Newtown Greek strip
must_try_food.why: Sydney's Greek community makes extraordinary souvlaki; crew discover this is better than anything in Greece

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Australian Merino wool products (Icebreaker, or local brand)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Icebreaker Sydney or department stores
must_buy_souvenirs.why: World's finest merino; crew buy base layers for cold-destination layovers; practical premium gift

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any Woolworths or Coles supermarket
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Australian cultural icon; cheap; excellent conversation-starter gift for non-Australians; yeast extract

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any supermarket
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Crew Tim Tam Slam technique is a crew cultural ritual; packs travel well; cheaper in Sydney than duty-free

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Aesop face wash or hand balm
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Aesop stores (Paddington, Pitt Street Mall)
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Melbourne-born luxury skincare; crew consider this the best grooming gift; herbal scent is distinctive

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Aboriginal art print or card set
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Cooee Art Gallery or Aboriginal Art Gallery, The Rocks
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Authentic certified artwork; cards and small prints are affordable; important cultural souvenir

must_do_experience.item: Bondi to Coogee coastal walk
must_do_experience.where: Start: Bondi Beach car park, End: Coogee Beach
must_do_experience.why: 6km; free; oceanside cliffs; $20 if you stop at Icebergs pool; crew fitness ritual; best morning activity

must_do_experience.item: Sydney Harbour kayak or ferry to Manly
must_do_experience.where: Circular Quay ferry or Kayaks at Lavender Bay
must_do_experience.why: See Sydney from the water; Manly ferry is $7; crew afternoon activity before evening departures

must_do_experience.item: Wine and cheese at the Sydney Fish Market Saturday
must_do_experience.where: Sydney Fish Market, Pyrmont (opens 7am)
must_do_experience.why: Largest fish market in southern hemisphere; crew arrive early; whole mud crabs and shucked oysters

must_try_food.item: Braai (BBQ) at a local restaurant
must_try_food.where: Carnivore Restaurant, Muldersdrift or any boerewors specialist
must_try_food.why: South African BBQ culture; boerewors sausage + pap + chakalaka; crew immersion experience

must_try_food.item: Bunny chow
must_try_food.where: Patel's Vegetarian Refreshment Room, Fordsburg
must_try_food.why: Durban-origin; quarter loaf of bread hollowed and filled with curry; crew unique SA street food

must_try_food.item: Piri-piri chicken at Nando's flagship
must_try_food.where: Original Nando's (Rosettenville or Sunninghill)
must_try_food.why: Yes, the global chain started here in JHB 1987; the original is noticeably better; crew must try the source

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Pick n Pay, Woolworths Food or airport
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Unique to SA; crew fill bags; Eleven O'Clock or Tick Tock brands; great gift for health-conscious colleagues

must_buy_souvenirs.item: South African wine (Swartland or Stellenbosch varieties)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Norman Goodfellows bottle store, Sandton
must_buy_souvenirs.why: World-class at a third of the price; crew use their duty-free allowance; Pinotage is uniquely South African

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any supermarket or duty-free
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Made from marula fruit; elephant on label; crew gift that's distinctly African; airport price competitive

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Beaded Zulu wire art or basket
must_buy_souvenirs.where: African Craft Market, Rosebank Mall
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Traditional Zulu beadwork; colourful; lightweight; authentic cultural souvenir crew carry home

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any Woolworths Food or speciality biltong shops
must_buy_souvenirs.why: SA's greatest gift to snacking; crew attempt to bring home internationally (check import rules)

must_do_experience.item: Apartheid Museum half-day visit
must_do_experience.where: Gold Reef Rd, Ormonde, JHB
must_do_experience.why: Essential South African history; powerful; 3-4 hours minimum; crew leave changed; opens 9am Tue-Sun

must_do_experience.item: Soweto township tour
must_do_experience.where: Book through hotel concierge or Soweto Backpackers
must_do_experience.why: Vibrancy and history of Africa's most famous township; Mandela's house; crew culture essential

must_do_experience.item: Lion and safari day trip (Pilanesberg or Cradle)
must_do_experience.where: Pilanesberg National Park (2hrs from JHB)
must_do_experience.why: For longer JHB layovers; Big 5 possible; crew who stay 24+ hours often do this

must_try_food.item: Simit and çay (sesame bread ring + tea)
must_try_food.where: Any street simitçi cart, or Simit Sarayı chain
must_try_food.why: Turkish breakfast of champions; $0.50 + $0.50; crew morning walk fuel around Sultanahmet

must_try_food.item: Balık ekmek (grilled fish sandwich)
must_try_food.where: Floating boats at Galata Bridge, Eminönü
must_try_food.why: Iconic Istanbul; fresh mackerel; open air; crew classic that you eat standing over the Bosphorus

must_try_food.item: Iskender kebab at Bursa's original İskender restaurant
must_try_food.where: İskender Kebap Restaurant, Istiklal area
must_try_food.why: Lamb over bread with tomato sauce and brown butter; original and best; crew Istanbul food religion

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Hafız Mustafa 1864 — multiple locations including airport
must_buy_souvenirs.why: 170-year-old confectionery; the real lokum; pistachios, rose, pomegranate; crew gift standard

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Egyptian Bazaar (Mısır Çarşısı), Eminönü
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Cheapest quality saffron in crew travel universe; crew buy in bulk; pack flat in luggage

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Turkish evil eye (nazar boncuğu) glass amulet
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Grand Bazaar or Kapalicarsi
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Iconic; blue glass; wall hanging or keyring; crew gift that everyone accepts; cheap and meaningful

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Grand Bazaar, Copper Bazaar section
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Functional souvenir; enables Turkish coffee at home; crew take these and small cups; beautiful craft object

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Jennifer's Hamam, Arasta Bazaar
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Flat-weave towel; compact; crew use these as beach towels globally; authentic vs tourist-grade

must_do_experience.item: Hammam experience at Çemberlitaş
must_do_experience.where: Çemberlitaş Hamamı, 400-year-old bathhouse
must_do_experience.why: Full Ottoman hammam; kese (exfoliation) + massage; crew ritual for jet-lag and cultural experience both

must_do_experience.item: Bosphorus boat cruise at sunset
must_do_experience.where: Eminönü ferry docks; city boats or private tours
must_do_experience.why: Two continents from the water; tulip-shaped tea glass; crew sunset ritual before evening flights

must_do_experience.item: Breakfast feast at a Turkish breakfast specialist
must_do_experience.where: Van Kahvaltı Evi, Cihangir / any Van-style breakfast place
must_do_experience.why: 30+ small dishes; olives, cheese, honey, eggs, breads; crews have 3-hour brunches here

must_try_food.item: Nasi lemak at Nasi Lemak Wanjo, Kampung Baru
must_try_food.where: Kampung Baru traditional Malay village, KL
must_try_food.why: Malaysia's national dish done properly; fragrant coconut rice, sambal, ikan bilis; crew early morning ritual

must_try_food.item: Char kway teow at Old Chinatown hawker stalls
must_try_food.where: Petaling Street area, Chinatown
must_try_food.why: Wok-fried flat noodles, egg, prawn, bean sprouts; charred wok technique; crew Malaysian noodle essential

must_try_food.item: Cendol at Penang Village food stalls
must_try_food.where: Lot 10 Hutong or Jalan Alor night stalls
must_try_food.why: Shaved ice dessert with pandan jelly, palm sugar, coconut milk; crew cool down treat in KL heat

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Craft Cultural Complex (KL Craft) or Central Market
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Malaysian batik is uniquely beautiful; different patterns from Indonesian; crew wearable souvenir

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any supermarket (Old Town White Coffee brand)
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Malaysia's distinctive white coffee blend; crew box sachets; cheaper than airport; good gift

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any 7-Eleven or Mr. DIY store
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Malaysian snacking craze; salted duck egg yolk flavour; crew bring boxes home as addictive gifts

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Royal Selangor Visitor Centre, Setapak Jaya
must_buy_souvenirs.why: 125-year Malaysian pewter brand; tankards, photo frames; crew factory tour + shop available

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Jakel Mall, Jalan Sultan Ismail
must_buy_souvenirs.why: World's largest Islamic fashion mall; crew with Muslim colleagues bring back scarves and abayas as gifts

must_do_experience.item: Batu Caves morning visit (before 10am)
must_do_experience.where: Batu Caves, 13km north of KL city
must_do_experience.why: 272 rainbow-painted steps; golden Murugan statue; free; Hindu cave temple; crew photo stop + culture

must_do_experience.item: KLCC Petronas Tower skybridge visit
must_do_experience.where: Petronas Twin Towers, tickets from Level 2
must_do_experience.why: World's tallest twin towers; skybridge at Level 41; crew bring every visitor here; book ahead

must_do_experience.item: Head to Jalan Alor for dinner
must_do_experience.where: Jalan Alor street food strip, Bukit Bintang
must_do_experience.why: Open-air street food; every Malaysian dish available; cold beer; crew group dinner standard every layover

must_try_food.item: Chole bhature at Sita Ram Diwan Chand
must_try_food.where: 3283 Rajguru Rd, Paharganj area, Old Delhi
must_try_food.why: Famous chickpea curry + fried bread; opens 8am; crew Old Delhi food pilgrimage start

must_try_food.item: Tandoori chicken at Moti Mahal
must_try_food.where: 3703 Netaji Subhash Marg, Daryaganj
must_try_food.why: Invented tandoori chicken here; 1947; crew historical food reference point; not cheap but worth it

must_try_food.item: Delhi street chaat (golgappa, papdi chaat)
must_try_food.where: Chandni Chowk street stalls — Paranthewali Gali
must_try_food.why: Puffed bread with tamarind water shot; crew challenge is the water (stomach tolerance); local experience

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Government of India Emporium (Cottage Industries), Janpath
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Authentic Kashmiri pashmina; not Ludhiana acrylic fakes; crew know the difference; Government shop = legit

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Khari Baoli spice market, Old Delhi or Khan Market
must_buy_souvenirs.why: World's largest spice market; crew buy blended masala chai packs; flat and light to pack

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Brass or copper deity figurine (Ganesh, etc.)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Dilli Haat market, INA
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Craft fair with artisans from all Indian states; fixed prices; crew spiritual souvenir for colleagues and family

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Indian block-printed cotton fabric or kurta
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Fabindia store, Khan Market or Connaught Place
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Quality Indian ethnic wear; Fabindia is crew-trusted brand; kurta as comfortable travel wear

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any Ayurvedic pharmacy or Kama Ayurveda store
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Ancient Indian beauty clay; crew buy as DIY face mask; Kama Ayurveda is the premium brand

must_do_experience.item: Old Delhi rickshaw tour through Chandni Chowk
must_do_experience.where: Start from Red Fort Gate, hire cycle rickshaw
must_do_experience.why: Sensory overload; spice bazaar, silver market, parantha lane; crew say this is the most alive they've felt traveling

must_do_experience.item: Yoga class at a Lodi Garden park early morning
must_do_experience.where: Lodi Colony area, 6-8am daily in park
must_do_experience.why: Free; locals practice yoga at sunrise; Delhi's most beautiful Mughal gardens; crew sunrise walk + stretch

must_do_experience.item: Hauz Khas Village food and gallery walk
must_do_experience.where: Hauz Khas Village, South Delhi
must_do_experience.why: Medieval ruins + contemporary galleries + restaurant rooftops over a lake; crew afternoon cultural loop

must_try_food.item: Vada pav (Mumbai burger) from a street stall
must_try_food.where: Any street stall — Shivaji Park area or CST Station
must_try_food.why: Mumbai's soul food; spiced potato fritter in bread; crew arrive from 16hr flights and eat this first

must_try_food.item: Pav bhaji at Sardar Restaurant
must_try_food.where: Tardeo, Mumbai 400034
must_try_food.why: Mixed vegetable mash with buttered bread rolls; crew Mumbai dinner staple; 50+ years institution

must_try_food.item: Bombay sandwich at Juhu Beach stalls
must_try_food.where: Juhu Beach, adjacent to JW Marriott crew hotel
must_try_food.why: Pressed sandwich with chutney, cucumber, tomato, beet; crew with Juhu layover hotels get these at breakfast

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Dharavi cooperative shops or Fashion Street
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Handmade leather sandals from Maharashtra; crew practical souvenir; durable and authentic

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Bombay Store, PM Rd, Fort Mumbai
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Indigenous Maharashtra tribal art; white geometric patterns on brown background; crew wall decoration

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Forest Essentials stores, Bandra or Colaba
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Premium Indian luxury Ayurveda; rose face mist and almond milk soap are crew staples; better value in Mumbai

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Mumbai Dabba carrier tiffin box replica
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Government Craft Shops or online from Bombay Store
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Functional Dabbawala lunch box; stainless steel; crew use for meal prep; unique Mumbai symbol

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Chai spice kit + Indian filter coffee set
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Kama Ayurveda, Colaba Causeway
must_buy_souvenirs.why: India's best portable gift; crew bring masala chai kits and explain Indian coffee filter technique to colleagues

must_do_experience.item: Dharavi walk with Reality Tours
must_do_experience.where: Dharavi, Mumbai — Reality Tours booking required
must_do_experience.why: Ethical guided tour; Asia's largest working township; crew perspective shift; all proceeds to local programs

must_do_experience.item: Sunset at Marine Drive (Queen's Necklace)
must_do_experience.where: Marine Drive, Nariman Point
must_do_experience.why: Curved seafront boulevard; sunset over Arabian Sea; crew running route and people-watching; free

must_do_experience.item: Elephanta Caves day trip by ferry
must_do_experience.where: Gateway of India ferry, 1-hour crossing
must_do_experience.why: UNESCO World Heritage 7th-century cave temples; crew with 24hr+ layovers highly recommend this

must_try_food.item: Sourdough clam chowder in a bread bowl
must_try_food.where: Boudin Bakery, Fisherman's Wharf or Ferry Building
must_try_food.why: Iconic SF; crew clam chowder ritual at the waterfront; the bread bowl concept originated here

must_try_food.item: Mission burrito at La Taqueria
must_try_food.where: 2889 Mission St, Mission District
must_try_food.why: James Beard Award-winning burrito; no rice, double-grilled; crew call this the world's best burrito

must_try_food.item: Dungeness crab at the Ferry Building
must_try_food.where: Ferry Building Marketplace
must_try_food.why: In season Nov-June; crack your own; SF waterfront; crew crustacean ritual on West Coast layovers

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Ghirardelli Square or any Walgreens
must_buy_souvenirs.why: San Francisco chocolate institution; crew bring these back by the bag; cheaper in-city than duty-free

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any Safeway or BevMo
must_buy_souvenirs.why: SF's original craft beer (1896); California flag on label; crew carry-on or check bag souvenir

must_buy_souvenirs.item: TCHO chocolate or Dandelion Chocolate bars
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Dandelion Chocolate, Valencia St, Mission or Ferry Building
must_buy_souvenirs.why: San Francisco craft chocolate revolution; single-origin bars; crew gift that says 'I know San Francisco'

must_buy_souvenirs.where: REI Co-op, 840 Brannan St, SoMa
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Premium outdoor gear; crew buy technical layers here for cold-destination layovers globally

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Muir Woods redwood souvenir (postcard, seed kit)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Muir Woods National Monument gift shop
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Ancient coast redwood souvenirs; small and meaningful; crew who do the Muir Woods day trip buy these

must_do_experience.item: Walk across the Golden Gate Bridge
must_do_experience.where: Battery East Trailhead, Presidio
must_do_experience.why: Free on foot; 2.7km; crew morning ritual; wind usually cold so bring jacket; sunrise walk for arriving crew

must_do_experience.item: Ferry to Sausalito for lunch
must_do_experience.where: Ferry Building to Sausalito (35 min)
must_do_experience.why: Harbour views; houseboat community; oyster lunch; crew weekend escape from city chaos

must_do_experience.item: Alcatraz Island tour
must_do_experience.where: Pier 33 ferry; book 2 weeks ahead minimum
must_do_experience.why: Audio tour narrated by former inmates and guards; crew rate this as one of the best US historic experiences

must_try_food.item: New York bagel with lox and cream cheese
must_try_food.where: Russ & Daughters, 179 E Houston St, LES (opens 8am)
must_try_food.why: 110-year-old appetizing shop; the definitive NYC bagel experience; crew arrive at opening before queues

must_try_food.item: Katz's Deli pastrami sandwich
must_try_food.where: 205 E Houston St, LES (opens 8am daily)
must_try_food.why: NYC institution since 1888; 1lb pastrami sandwich; splitting is acceptable; crew classic lunch

must_try_food.item: New York slice from a coal-fired pizzeria
must_try_food.where: Di Fara Pizza (Brooklyn) or Joe's Pizza (Greenwich Village)
must_try_food.why: The correct New York pizza debate never ends; crew compare Neapolitan vs NYC coal-fired slice every layover

must_buy_souvenirs.item: New York Times Sunday edition (on Saturday night)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any 24-hour newsstand or Duane Reade
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Still the best broadsheet; crew take the Sunday Times home as cultural artifact; available Saturday night

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Magnolia Bakery banana pudding or cupcake
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Magnolia Bakery, Bleecker St, West Village or Rockefeller Plaza
must_buy_souvenirs.why: NYC cultural icon; banana pudding is their best; crew bring these to hotel room for jet-lag comfort food

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Strand Bookstore tote bag + one great book
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Strand Bookstore, 828 Broadway, Union Square
must_buy_souvenirs.why: 18 miles of books; $1 outdoor bins; tote bag is iconic NYC accessory; crew book haul tradition

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Chelsea Market hot sauce or artisan food
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Chelsea Market, 75 9th Ave
must_buy_souvenirs.why: High Line access + food hall; NYC artisan condiments and local brands; crew food souvenir destination

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Glossier or beauty brand direct from NYC flagship
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Glossier, 123 Lafayette St, SoHo
must_buy_souvenirs.why: NYC-origin brand; in-person exclusives sometimes; crew beauty haul destination; Phase 1 sets beloved

must_do_experience.item: High Line walk from Meatpacking District to Hudson Yards
must_do_experience.where: Enter at Gansevoort St, Meatpacking District
must_do_experience.why: Elevated park on former railway; art installations; skyline views; free; crew daily walk standard in NYC

must_do_experience.item: Brooklyn Bridge walk + DUMBO photo + Grimaldi's pizza
must_do_experience.where: Manhattan Bridge Park entrance, City Hall area
must_do_experience.why: Full NYC afternoon: bridge walk, Brooklyn views, Grimaldi's coal-fired pizza; crew afternoon circuit

must_do_experience.item: Late night jazz at Village Vanguard or Blue Note
must_do_experience.where: Village Vanguard: 178 7th Ave S, West Village
must_do_experience.why: World's most famous jazz clubs; two sets nightly; crew treat themselves after early-arrival evenings

must_try_food.item: Weisswurst with sweet mustard and pretzel (before noon)
must_try_food.where: Hofbräuhaus or any traditional Bavarian restaurant
must_try_food.why: Bavarian white veal sausage; ONLY eaten before noon by tradition; crew observe the rule to feel like locals

must_try_food.item: Obatzda (Bavarian cheese spread) with dark bread
must_try_food.where: Any beer garden — Augustiner-Keller or Viktualienmarkt beer garden
must_try_food.why: Soft cheese, butter, paprika spread; with a Maß (1L) beer; the quintessential Munich outdoor meal

must_try_food.item: Leberkäse (meat loaf) sandwich at Viktualienmarkt
must_try_food.where: Viktualienmarkt sandwich stands, opens 8am
must_try_food.why: Munich street food; warm meat loaf slice in fresh roll; $3; crew pre-museum fuel on Maxvorstadt days

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Authentic Bavarian steins (not painted tourist ones)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Hofbräuhaus shop or Hirmer department store
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Heavy but crew check-bag them; one-litre stone tankard; family heirloom quality; proper German craft

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Radi (Bavarian white radish) slicer tool + Maß glass
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Viktualienmarkt kitchen goods stalls
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Niche and specific Munich souvenir; the spiral-sliced radish is beer garden culture; crew gift for beer lovers

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Ritter Sport BUNTE SCHOKOWELT, Marienplatz
must_buy_souvenirs.why: German chocolate institution; seasonal squares; crew gift standard; design your own box option in store

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Dirndl fabric or mini dirndl accessory
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Loden-Frey, Maffeistraße (traditional outfitter)
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Traditional Bavarian dress; crew who don't buy the full thing get headbands or small accessories as jokes

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Dallmayr, Dienerstraße 14-15, Munich
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Coffee royal warrant supplier; the original Dallmayr Prodomo blend; crew food souvenir from a German institution

must_do_experience.item: Beer garden (Biergarten) afternoon
must_do_experience.where: Augustiner-Keller (3000 seats) or English Garden Chinesischer Turm
must_do_experience.why: Bring your own food + buy beer; Munich social institution; crew blend with locals under chestnut trees

must_do_experience.item: Surfing the Eisbach river wave in the English Garden
must_do_experience.where: Eisbach, Englischer Garten (near Museum Insel)
must_do_experience.why: Free spectator sport; year-round surfers on a standing river wave; crew watch on walks through the park

must_do_experience.item: BMW Museum and World tour
must_do_experience.where: BMW-Welt, Am Olympiapark 2, Munich
must_do_experience.why: Architecture + cars + motorcycles; opens 9am Tue-Sun; free exterior; crew tech and design experience

must_try_food.item: Bobotie at a Cape Malay restaurant
must_try_food.where: Biesmiellah Restaurant, Bo-Kaap
must_try_food.why: Cape Malay spiced minced meat with egg custard top; crew Cape Town signature dish stop at Bo-Kaap

must_try_food.item: Snoek braai fish at Kalk Bay
must_try_food.where: Kalk Bay harbour fish market (Sat morning)
must_try_food.why: West Coast smoked fish; crew drive the scenic route to Kalk Bay for fresh catch from the boats

must_try_food.item: Gatsby sandwich (Cape Town foot-long)
must_try_food.where: Super Fisheries, Athlone or any Cape Flats takeaway
must_try_food.why: Half-metre bread roll with chips, egg, meat; crew must-try local food that no guidebook covers properly

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Rooibos tea and Honeybush tea selection
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Woolworths Food, V&A Waterfront
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Cape fynbos teas; Woolworths range is the best quality; crew pack these as they can't be found elsewhere

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Groot Constantia Estate or V&A Waterfront wine shops
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Oldest wine estate in SA; Constantia wine is Cape's finest; crew use duty-free allowance here every time

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Greenmarket Square craft market
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Recycled wire figures of African animals and people; unique Cape Town craft; lightweight to carry

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Old Biscuit Mill, Woodstock or Neighbourgoods Market
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Local Cape Town leather artisans; crew buy wallets and passport covers; supports local

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Buchu gin or Inverroche Cape fynbos gin
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Norman Goodfellows or specialist bottle stores
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Cape botanical gin using unique fynbos plants; crew gin enthusiasts seek this out; export-quality

must_do_experience.item: Table Mountain Cable Car at sunrise
must_do_experience.where: Cable Car Lower Station, Tafelberg Rd
must_do_experience.why: 360-degree views; opening is 8am (weather permitting); crew who wake at dawn for this call it life-changing

must_do_experience.item: Cape Point and Boulders Beach penguin colony drive
must_do_experience.where: Cape Peninsula National Park (rental car or tour)
must_do_experience.why: African penguins at Boulders; Cape Point lighthouse; crew half-day scenic drive is standard layover activity

must_do_experience.item: Neighbourgoods Market at Old Biscuit Mill (Saturday)
must_do_experience.where: Old Biscuit Mill, 373 Albert Rd, Woodstock (9am-2pm)
must_do_experience.why: Cape Town's best artisan food market; DJ sets; local chefs; crew Saturday morning ritual for longer layovers

must_try_food.item: Grüne Soße (Frankfurt Green Sauce)
must_try_food.where: Apfelwein Wagner or any traditional Sachsenhausen restaurant
must_try_food.why: Frankfurt's UNESCO-listed culinary tradition; 7-herb sauce over boiled eggs or schnitzel; crew heritage meal

must_try_food.item: Ebbelwei (Frankfurt apple wine) at Sachsenhausen
must_try_food.where: Apfelwein Wagner, Schweizer Str 71
must_try_food.why: Frankfurt's regional speciality; drunk from a blue-patterned Bembel jug; crew German beer alternative

must_try_food.item: Frankfurter sausage from Kleinmarkthalle
must_try_food.where: Kleinmarkthalle, Hasengasse 5-7
must_try_food.why: The original; thin, served with mustard and bread; crew note it's different from hot dogs named after it

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Frankfurt wine specialist or Kleinmarkthalle wine stalls
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Germany's finest white wine region is 30 min away; crew use duty-free for Riesling Spätlese

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Brotzeit box (artisan rye bread + German sausages)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Kleinmarkthalle
must_buy_souvenirs.why: German charcuterie board components to take home; vacuum-packed sausages travel well

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Goethe House shop, Grosser Hirschgraben 23
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Birthplace of Germany's greatest writer; crew buy Faust editions or quill-pen sets as niche literary gifts

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any REWE supermarket or Kleinmarkthalle
must_buy_souvenirs.why: German mustard range from sweet to extra-hot; crew pack assortments; inexpensive flavourful gift

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any supermarket — Haeberlein-Metzger brand best
must_buy_souvenirs.why: German biscuit tradition; spiced; crew gift around Christmas but available year-round

must_do_experience.item: Römerberg medieval square walk + river waterfront
must_do_experience.where: Römerberg, Frankfurt Altstadt
must_do_experience.why: Half-timbered houses; river views; free; crew architecture + riverside walk before museum strip

must_do_experience.item: Main River cycle hire along the Museumsufer
must_do_experience.where: Call-a-Bike stations near Sachsenhausen
must_do_experience.why: Cycle 15 museums in one afternoon; flat; bike rental €10; crew active layover day option

must_do_experience.item: Day trip to Heidelberg Castle
must_do_experience.where: Heidelberg by ICE train (45 min from Frankfurt HBF)
must_do_experience.why: Germany's most romantic castle ruins; old town walk; crew longer layover classic day excursion

must_try_food.item: Churros con chocolate at San Ginés
must_try_food.where: Pasadizo de San Ginés, 5 (open 24 hours)
must_try_food.why: Open all night; post-clubbing crew breakfast; thick hot chocolate for dipping; Madrid institution since 1894

must_try_food.item: Jamón Ibérico de bellota at a specialist bar
must_try_food.where: Juana la Loca or any jamonería in Chueca
must_try_food.why: The world's finest cured ham; crew discover that supermarket jamón is not this; tasting education

must_try_food.item: Pintxos and vermouth (vermut) walk, La Latina
must_try_food.where: La Latina neighbourhood, Sunday midday ritual
must_try_food.why: Sunday vermouth culture; cheap bar snacks; crew walk from bar to bar; the right way to do Madrid lunch

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Whole leg Jamón Ibérico (mini vacuum-packed leg)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Museo del Jamón, Gran Via / Carrefour market
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Crew buy whole cured legs; the mini 500g vacuum packs travel well; serious gift for food lovers

must_buy_souvenirs.where: El Almendro stores, multiple locations
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Spain's Christmas sweet available year-round; hard or soft varieties; crew gift for holiday season

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Loewe flagship, Calle Serrano
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Madrid's iconic luxury leather house; crew treat themselves or gift small leather goods

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Abanicos (Spanish fans) from Casa de Diego
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Casa de Diego, Puerta del Sol 12 (since 1858)
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Handmade fans; practical in Madrid heat; crew female flight attendants love these; genuine craft

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Spanish olive oil (EVOO) from La Chinata
must_buy_souvenirs.where: La Chinata stores or Mercado de San Miguel
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Spain produces 44% of world's olive oil; La Chinata is the crew-recommended brand for quality-to-price

must_do_experience.item: Flamenco show at Corral de la Morería
must_do_experience.where: Calle de la Morería, 17, La Latina
must_do_experience.why: World's most famous tablao; 1956; intimate setting; crew love this on first Madrid layover

must_do_experience.item: Retiro Park row boat and Sunday people-watching
must_do_experience.where: Parque del Retiro, Estanque del Retiro lake
must_do_experience.why: €6 row boat; crew Sunday morning; street performers; glass palace; free park entry

must_do_experience.item: El Rastro flea market (Sunday morning only)
must_do_experience.where: Calle de la Ribera de Curtidores, La Latina
must_do_experience.why: Europe's largest flea market; Sunday 9am-3pm; crew antique and vintage finds; must leave by noon before crowds

must_try_food.item: Pan con tomate (bread + tomato + olive oil)
must_try_food.where: Any traditional Catalan bar or Bar Marsella
must_try_food.why: Catalan breakfast ritual; rub raw tomato on bread; crew do this daily in Barcelona as morning ritual

must_try_food.item: Patatas bravas at Bar Calders, Sant Antoni
must_try_food.where: Bar Calders, Parlament 25, Sant Antoni
must_try_food.why: Barcelona tapas standard; fried potatoes + spicy + aioli; crew bar-hop and order these everywhere

must_try_food.item: Seafood paella at La Mar Salada
must_try_food.where: Passeig de Joan de Borbó 58-59, Barceloneta
must_try_food.why: Proper Catalan seafood rice; not tourist trap; crew lunch near Barceloneta beach; socarrat crust essential

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Espardanyes (canvas espadrilles) from La Manual Alpargatera
must_buy_souvenirs.where: La Manual Alpargatera, Carrer d'Avinyó 7
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Handmade Catalan espadrilles since 1941; sold to Dali and Hemingway; crew wear these on off days

must_buy_souvenirs.where: El Nacional restaurant bar or Mercat de Santa Caterina
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Catalan answer to Champagne; excellent value; crew buy bottles for home celebrations; light vs brut discussion

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Colmado (deli) goods from Lafuente, La Boqueria
must_buy_souvenirs.where: La Boqueria market stalls
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Catalan charcuterie, olives, oils; vacuum-packed for travel; crew foodie souvenir standard in Barcelona

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Gaudi architectural print or tile replica
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Palau Güell gift shop or MNAC museum shop
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Trencadis tile mosaic replicas; crew design-conscious gift; Casa Batlló postcards and Sagrada Familia prints

must_buy_souvenirs.item: FC Barcelona replica jersey (from official store)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: FC Barcelona Megastore, Camp Nou or Maremàgnum
must_buy_souvenirs.why: World's most recognized football club; crew gifts for football-loving colleagues; buy official, not market fakes

must_do_experience.item: Sagrada Família interior with booked ticket
must_do_experience.where: Carrer de Mallorca 401, Eixample
must_do_experience.why: Gaudí's unfinished masterpiece; interior light show at noon is extraordinary; crew book the tower climb

must_do_experience.item: Barceloneta beach morning swim before crowds
must_do_experience.where: Barceloneta beach, before 9am
must_do_experience.why: Mediterranean swimming; crew arrive early before tourist crush; post-swim coffee at beach chiringuito

must_do_experience.item: El Born neighbourhood tapas evening walk
must_do_experience.where: Start at Mercat de Santa Caterina, meander south
must_do_experience.why: Bar-hopping with vermouth culture; tiny pintxos bars; crew evening before late departures

must_try_food.item: Flat white at a Grey Lynn or Ponsonby cafe
must_try_food.where: Kokako, Grey Lynn / Eighthirty, CBD
must_try_food.why: New Zealand co-invented the flat white (alongside Australia); crew take sides in this debate over the first cup

must_try_food.item: Hangi (earth oven Māori feast)
must_try_food.where: Hāngī restaurant or cultural night show event
must_try_food.why: Traditional Māori cooking method; pork and vegetables in earth pit; crew cultural food experience NZ-specific

must_try_food.item: Fresh green-lipped mussels
must_try_food.where: Any fish and chip shop near the waterfront or Depot Eatery
must_try_food.why: NZ endemic species; sweeter than any mussel elsewhere; crew benchmark food that NZ does best

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any chemist or specialty store — Honeyland or supermarket
must_buy_souvenirs.why: NZ-only antibacterial honey; crew medical and culinary essential; buy certified rating not cheap fakes

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Merino wool possum beanie or gloves
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Untouched World or Icebreaker stores, CBD
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Merino-possum blend is uniquely NZ; softest warm garment; crew buy for cold-route layovers

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Certified Māori arts galleries — Council of Maori Craftsmen
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Sacred Māori stone; look for authentication; crew meaningful cultural souvenir with provenance certificate

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any supermarket or Countdown
must_buy_souvenirs.why: NZ-only soft drink; crew novelty food souvenir; the unique flavour is hard to describe outside NZ

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Countdown or Pak'nSave supermarkets
must_buy_souvenirs.why: NZ (not Australia) invented pavlova (crew take sides here too); take the mix home; lightweight

must_do_experience.item: Waiheke Island wine ferry day trip
must_do_experience.where: Ferry from Britomart — 35 min to Waiheke
must_do_experience.why: Auckland's own Tuscany; vineyard restaurants; crew with 24hr+ layovers rate this as top 10 NZ experience

must_do_experience.item: Sky Tower bungee jump or walk
must_do_experience.where: Corner Victoria and Federal St, CBD
must_do_experience.why: Sky Tower walk or jump; views to Bay of Islands; crew adrenaline activity on arrival-day layover

must_do_experience.item: Waitematā Harbour sailing with Tourism NZ boats
must_do_experience.where: Viaduct Harbour, downtown Auckland
must_do_experience.why: Auckland City of Sails; crew go sailing on visiting tall ships or charter yachts; unique to AKL

must_try_food.item: Churrasco at a rodízio (all-you-can-eat BBQ)
must_try_food.where: Fogo de Chão, R. Barão de Campinas 91 or Barbacoa
must_try_food.why: Endless grilled meats brought tableside; crew group dinner institution; the real Brazilian BBQ

must_try_food.item: Pão de queijo (cheese bread rolls)
must_try_food.where: Any padaria bakery from 7am or Bob's chain
must_try_food.why: Tapioca flour cheese bread; warm from oven; crew morning snack every Brazil layover without fail

must_try_food.item: Açaí bowl at a specialist juice bar
must_try_food.where: Polis Sucos, Vila Madalena or any juice chain
must_try_food.why: Brazilian açaí is completely different from what's exported; frozen pulp with banana and granola; crew health reset

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Shopping Iguatemi or any Havaianas store
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Made in Brazil; prices are 60% of international retail; crew stock up on 3-4 pairs per visit

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Empório São Paulo or Wine.com.br delivery
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Leblon, Ypióca Crystal are crew-recommended; take home caipirinha kit with fresh lime; uniquely Brazilian

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Coffee — Sul de Minas or Cerrado beans
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any good empório or Mercado Municipal
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Brazil is the world's largest coffee producer; fresh single-origin; crew buy kilo bags for home

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Parana pine cone resin figurine (folk art)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Artisanal craft fair — ARTESP approved markets
must_buy_souvenirs.why: South Brazilian folk carving tradition; unique to Brazil; crew cultural souvenir that's lightweight

must_buy_souvenirs.where: H.Stern or Amsterdam Sauer, Iguatemi mall
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Brazil mines most of the world's precious coloured stones; crew buy gems at source prices; certificates important

must_do_experience.item: Ibirapuera Park Sunday morning run or cycle
must_do_experience.where: Ibirapuera Park — accessible from Jardins hotels
must_do_experience.why: São Paulo's Central Park; 350 acres; free; open-air museums inside; crew morning wellness routine

must_do_experience.item: Liberdade Japanese neighbourhood walk and Sunday market
must_do_experience.where: Rua Galvão Bueno, Liberdade, São Paulo
must_do_experience.why: Largest Japanese diaspora city outside Japan; ramen, sake bars, Japanese supermarkets; crew Japan-in-Brazil

must_do_experience.item: Helipad tour over São Paulo skyline
must_do_experience.where: Helisul Táxi Aéreo or similar operators (GRU airport area)
must_do_experience.why: São Paulo skyline by helicopter is extraordinary scale; crew aviation types especially love this; 20-30 min tours

must_try_food.item: In-N-Out Burger (Double-Double, Animal Style)
must_try_food.where: Nearest LAX location: 9149 S Sepulveda Blvd
must_try_food.why: California institution; crew land and go straight here; 5 min from airport; Animal Style is crew order

must_try_food.item: Breakfast burrito from a taqueria
must_try_food.where: Lupe's #2 Tex-Mex, or any Mexican truck on La Brea
must_try_food.why: LA breakfast burrito culture; scrambled eggs, cheese, salsa in a flour tortilla; crew morning after red-eye fuel

must_try_food.item: Omakase ramen at Tatsu or Tsujita
must_try_food.where: Tsujita LA Artisan Noodle, 2057 Sawtelle Blvd
must_try_food.why: Little Osaka on Sawtelle Blvd; authentic Japanese ramen; crew food discovery neighbourhood in West LA

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Erewhon, multiple locations (Calabasas, Cahuenga)
must_buy_souvenirs.why: LA's iconic overpriced wellness market; crew buy Hailey Bieber smoothies as celebrity-adjacent experience

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Vintage band tee or Levi's from Melrose Ave shops
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Wasteland or Resurrection, Melrose Ave
must_buy_souvenirs.why: LA vintage is global reference point; crew thrifting tour; buy vintage Levi's for 1/3 of EU price

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Patagonia or outdoor gear from REI (LA flagship)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: REI, 402 Colorado Ave, Santa Monica
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Santa Monica location; crew buy technical outdoor gear for rotation; prices and selection best in US

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Local California olive oil or wine from Santa Barbara
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Farmshop, Brentwood Country Mart
must_buy_souvenirs.why: California EVOO and Sta. Rita Hills Pinot; crew food-wine souvenir from a producer 2hrs away

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Lakers or Dodgers merchandise (from official store)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Lakers Store at Staples/Arena or Dodgers team store
must_buy_souvenirs.why: LA sports culture gift; crew buy for sports-fan colleagues; official store quality vs airport knockoffs

must_do_experience.item: Griffith Observatory hike at sunset
must_do_experience.where: 2800 E Observatory Ave — hike from Los Feliz trail
must_do_experience.why: Free; best LA skyline view; planetarium shows $10; crew 2hr hike from Hillhurst Ave entrance

must_do_experience.item: Santa Monica Pier + Third Street Promenade walk
must_do_experience.where: Santa Monica Pier, Ocean Ave
must_do_experience.why: Pacific Ocean + Route 66 end point; free; crew beach walk before late-night departures

must_do_experience.item: Joshua Tree day trip (desert + rock climbing + stars)
must_do_experience.where: Joshua Tree National Park, 2hrs from LAX
must_do_experience.why: For longer LA layovers; crew stargazing is spectacular; unique desert landscape; book accommodation early

must_try_food.item: Chicago deep-dish pizza at Lou Malnati's
must_try_food.where: Lou Malnati's, 439 N Wells St, River North
must_try_food.why: 30-min bake time; order ahead; crew first-timer Chicago experience; buttery crust is the secret

must_try_food.item: Chicago-style hot dog at Portillo's
must_try_food.where: Portillo's, 100 W Ontario St
must_try_food.why: No ketchup ever; celery salt, sport peppers, dill pickle, yellow mustard; crew food culture lesson

must_try_food.item: Italian beef sandwich at Al's #1 Italian Beef
must_try_food.where: Al's #1 Italian Beef, 169 W Ontario St
must_try_food.why: Chicago original since 1938; giardiniera hot; dipped in beef jus; crew discover this is not Italian

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Garrett Popcorn, multiple Chicago locations
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Chicago institution; the mix flavour is controversial and addictive; crew buy tins to take on the plane back

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Lou Malnati's frozen deep-dish pizza (pack to fly)
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Lou Malnati's ships or in-store pickup
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Crew check-bag frozen pizza; dry ice available; arrives home; Chicago neighbours are jealous

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Chicago Architecture Center, 111 E Wacker Dr
must_buy_souvenirs.why: World's best architectural museum in city form; crew buy prints, books, and scale models of Chicago buildings

must_buy_souvenirs.where: Any Chicago liquor store — Binny's Beverage Depot
must_buy_souvenirs.why: The notoriously bitter wormwood spirit; crew dare colleagues to drink it; only sold in Illinois; novelty gift

must_buy_souvenirs.item: Blues Brothers or Chicago music merchandise
must_buy_souvenirs.where: Rock Around the Clock, Wabash St
must_buy_souvenirs.why: Chicago blues and jazz culture; Buddy Guy's Legends has a store; crew music fans love the legacy merch

must_do_experience.item: Chicago Architecture River Cruise
must_do_experience.where: Wendella or Chicago's First Lady departures, Michigan Ave
must_do_experience.why: 90-minute river tour; guides explain every building; crew architecture enthusiasts rate this top-5 globally

must_do_experience.item: Blues club night at Buddy Guy's Legends
must_do_experience.where: 700 S Wabash Ave, South Loop
must_do_experience.why: Buddy Guy's own club; live blues Fri-Sat; opens 5pm; crew music pilgrimage in birthplace of electric blues

must_do_experience.item: Bean (Cloud Gate) + Millennium Park at dawn
must_do_experience.where: Millennium Park, S Michigan Ave
must_do_experience.why: Crowds gone; reflection is clear; Chicago skyline in the chrome; crew fitness run through the park at 6am
